scope.catalyst_extraction: Forensic focus on ENH_08 (DHS) and ENH_10 (UMAC/RCAT)
scope.regulatory_overlay: Blue List Status & NDAA compliance sentiment

local_physics.shutdown_protocol: IF Date < Feb 13 AND DHS_Status = 'CR' THEN Sentiment = 'Mixed/Anxious'
local_physics.lineage_boost: IF Ticker = 'UMAC' AND Order_Status = 'Fulfilled' THEN Sentiment = 'Constructive'
local_physics.innovation_anticipation: IF Event = 'RCAT Innovation Day' AND Days_To_Event < 14 THEN Sentiment = 'Speculative Bullish'

operations.action: Append 'Sentiment Overlay' summary to the forensic log.
If catalyst identified, update Type/Details/Impact fields in SSoT.
